mnemonics: IO API: Input/Output Access Ports Interface
keyPoints: Use `pandas.read_csv()` for reading CSV files into DataFrames
Use `pandas.to_csv()` for writing DataFrames to CSV files
Use `with open()` context manager for safe file handling
commonMistakes: Forgetting to specify the correct file path or delimiter
Not handling file encoding issues (e.g., UTF-8 vs Latin-1)
Leaving file objects open without using context managers
